description_long: This is a tall, conical cup with a wide opening and a narrower base, featuring a striking black-and-white space-themed decorative pattern. The exterior is adorned with illustrations of rockets, planets, stars, an astronaut, and abstract cosmic motifs, all rendered in a hand-drawn style. The cup's surface is smooth and hard, likely made from ceramic or plastic, with a glossy finish that enhances the contrast of the artwork. The interior appears plain and light-colored, providing a clean backdrop for beverages. There are no visible handles, lids, or branding elements on the cup. Its playful and artistic design makes it suitable for both everyday use and as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A tall, conical cup with a black-and-white space-themed decorative pattern featuring rockets, planets, and an astronaut. The cup has a smooth, glossy surface and no handle or lid.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front of the cup, showcasing a rocket, a planet, and a cluster of stars and cosmic motifs.
description_view_1: This side displays a large, circular sun-like motif with radiating lines, surrounded by smaller space elements.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a large striped planet and a ringed planet, with additional stars and abstract shapes.
description_view_3: This view features an astronaut tethered in space, floating near a large planet and surrounded by smaller cosmic illustrations.
